BatchChangeToPostpaid.config: Configuration for batch converting instances to postpaid, up to 20 instances supported
BatchChangeToPostpaid.config.cdsList: (Deprecated) List of associated CDS data disks to convert; defaults to empty, "all" means all associated disks (e.g. "cdsList":["all"]); pass specific disk IDs to convert only selected disks
BatchChangeToPostpaid.config.effectiveType: Effective mode: AtOnce (convert immediately) or AfterExpiration (convert after expiration). Defaults to AfterExpiration if not specified. Must be consistent across all instances in a batch operation.
